title: cotema spiralis
intro: Cotema spiralis, also known as the Squirting Cucumber or Horned Cucumber, is a tropical vine native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique spiral-shaped fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cotema spiralis include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating various skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
